description: Cross-language conformance for a pure-I/O data loader MOUNTED AS A MODEL SUBSYSTEM and consumed by the owning model's OWN equations (RFC pure-io-data-loaders §4.3; CONFORMANCE_SPEC.md §5.11). The flattener must lower each DataLoader-subsystem variable to a const-array-backed observed `<owner>.<subkey>.<var>` (Python: an observed + LoaderField; Julia: an observed keyed for the provider/const_arrays seam), and simulate must bind its value so BOTH a bare-scalar reference (`raw.k`) AND a gather (`index(raw.wind, 2)`) resolve. The forcing is CONST, so the golden trajectory is analytic and exact. Complements the top-level-loader fixtures (`tests/valid/advection_reaction_loaded_ic_bc.esm`, `packages/earthsci_toolkit/tests/fixtures/loader_injection/loader_consumer.esm`), which cover top-level / variable_map-coupled loaders + gather but NOT subsystem-mount + direct bare-scalar consumption.
